titleStmt.title: SII 39.235: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 235. (A.R. No. 235 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1413 (1491-92 A.D.)

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription registers the gift of (after exempting certain taxes as) sarvamaṇya land for conducting festivals and Rāhuttamiṇḍaṉ śandi in the same temple. The signatories are Paḷḷigoṇḍa-Perumāḷ alias Kachchiyarāyan. Taxes like Nāṭṭukkānikkāi, Kudiraikkāṇikkāi, Chekku-Āyam, Paṉivilai, Nallerudu, Naṟpasu, Nallerumai, Nallādu are mentioned in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam 1000 4 100 10 3
mel cellā niṉṟa paritāpi va
ruṣam cittirai mātam
muṭṭam piṭāriyār koyil
built in wall
m mutalāka Uṭaiyār koyil ci
kaccirāyar Inta Ūr nāṉku E
llaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam tirunāmattu
kkāṇi Āka Utakam paṇṇi kalveṭ
ṭik kuṭutta nilattukku varum kaṭa
mai viṉiyokam nāṭṭuk kāṇikkai
kutiraik kāṇikkai kaṟpūrakkā
ṇikkai mallaiyam camayappaṭi
Āyam Ōlai Eḻuttu vattaṉai ce
kku Āyam tirikai Āyam kallā
yam karuvi Āyam kaṭaṉ vakaiyi
ṉvilai paṉṟivilai nalerutu
naṟpacu nallerumai nallāṭu
kāṇikai varimuṭṭu koḷḷu
ppayaṟu ney Eṇṇai Iṉavari pu
lavari kuṭippaṇam maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭa paḻavari putuvari cakala camutā
yap piṟāttiyum Uṭpaṭa Iṉnāya
ṉāṟku Aṅkaraṅka pokattukku
m tirunāḷ Uṟcevaṅkaḷuk
kum Irākutta miṇṭaṉ canti
Upayattukkum cantirātitta
varaiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyam
Āka naṭakkumpaṭi Iraṇiya Uta
ka tārāpūṟuvam Āka cetta Aḷavu
kku Inta niṉṟayattile cantiṟā
ttiya varaiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka
Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum Inta taṉ
mattai Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ
keṅkairaiyil kārām pacuvaik
koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭavarka
ḷ Ākavum Ivai paḷḷikoṇṭa perumāṉarāna
kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
